education.degree: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Counseling Psychology
education.description: Doctoral research focused on indigenous knowledge systems and cultural approaches to psychology. Dissertation explored culturally grounded mental health practices.
education.thesis: Research on indigenous psychology and cultural evolution in African contexts
achievements: First doctoral graduate in Counseling Psychology department

education.degree: Master of Arts (MA) in Counseling Psychology
education.description: Advanced training in counseling psychology with focus on clinical practice and research methodologies. Specialized in cross-cultural counseling approaches.
education.thesis: Cultural factors in mental health interventions

education.description: Professional training in psychological counseling techniques and clinical practice. Focus on practical counseling skills and ethical practices.
Undergraduate education combining arts disciplines with educational pedagogy. Foundation in psychology, sociology, and educational theory.

certifications.title: Licensed Counseling Psychologist
certifications.description: Professional license to practice psychology in Kenya. Requires ongoing professional development and ethical standards compliance.

certifications.title: Registered Psychologist
certifications.description: Professional registration recognizing qualifications and ethical practice standards.

professionalDevelopment.title: Cultural Evolution Society Advanced Training
professionalDevelopment.description: Advanced training in cultural evolution theory and research methodologies.

professionalDevelopment.title: Longitudinal Research Design and Analysis
professionalDevelopment.description: Specialized training in longitudinal study design and statistical analysis.

professionalDevelopment.title: Cross-Cultural Research Ethics
professionalDevelopment.description: Training in ethical considerations for cross-cultural and indigenous research.

academicTimeline.degree: Master of Arts in Counseling Psychology

academicTimeline.role: Senior Lecturer & Head of Psychology Department

achievements: First PhD graduate in Counseling Psychology at CUEA
